items.name: Gemini AI
items.innerDesc:
🧠 Chat with Google Gemini AI

Example: /ai/gemini?text=Hola

items.name: Random Meme
items.desc: Meme aleatorio de Reddit/Pinterest/Imgflip en español
items.innerDesc:
🖼️ Meme aleatorio de múltiples fuentes

Ejemplo: /random/meme
Imagen directa: /random/meme?imagen=true

items.name: TikTok Search
items.innerDesc:
🎵 Search videos on TikTok

Parameters:
• query - Search term
• limit - Results count (1-30, default: 10)

Example: /search/tiktok?query=badbunny&limit=5

items.name: YouTube Audio
items.innerDesc:
🎵 Download audio from YouTube

Usage: ?url=YOUTUBE_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: YouTube Video
items.innerDesc:
🎬 Download video from YouTube

Parameters:
• url - YouTube URL
• quality - 360, 720, 1080
• download=true - Direct download

items.name: TikTok Downloader
items.innerDesc:
📱 Download TikTok videos without watermark

Usage: ?url=TIKTOK_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: Mediafire Downloader
items.innerDesc:
📦 Download files from Mediafire

Usage: ?url=MEDIAFIRE_URL
Download: &download=true

items.name: Pinterest Downloader
items.desc: Search and download images/videos from Pinterest
items.innerDesc:
🎨 Search or download from Pinterest

Search: ?query=SEARCH_TERM&limit=20
Download: ?url=PINTEREST_PIN_URL
Direct download: &download=true

items.name: Image HD Enhancer
items.desc: Enhance image quality to HD using AI
items.innerDesc:
🖼️ Mejora la calidad de tus imágenes a HD con IA

Método: POST
Formato: multipart/form-data
Parámetro: image (el archivo)
Límite: 10MB
Formatos: JPG, PNG, WEBP

Ejemplo:
curl -X POST -F "image=@foto.jpg" /tools/image-hd

items.name: Traductor
items.innerDesc:
🌐 Traduce texto a cualquier idioma

Parámetros:
• text - Texto a traducir
• target - Idioma destino (default: es)

Ejemplo: /translate?text=Hello&target=es
Códigos: es, en, fr, it, pt, de, ja, ko, zh, ru
